text:
```json
{
  "type": "DRAG_FILL",
  "title": "The Pen Challenge",
  "lessonText": "Complete the sales pitch to win the challenge!",
  "data": {
    "challenges": [
      {
        "instruction": "Fill in the blanks to complete the opening statement.",
        "codeTemplate": "Hi, I'm [Your Name], and I'm excited to ___ you this amazing ___. This isn't just any pen; it's a tool to ___ your ideas.",
        "options": [
          "pen",
          "unlock",
          "showcase",
          "present",
          "ordinary",
          "capture"
        ],
        "correctAnswer": "present,pen,capture",
        "explanation": "This opening establishes your enthusiasm and highlights the pen's purpose."
      },
      {
        "instruction": "Complete the sentence highlighting the pen's unique value.",
        "codeTemplate": "This pen isn't just for writing; it's a gateway to ___ and ___. It helps you ___ your thoughts.",
        "options": [
          "innovation",
          "organization",
          "clarity",
          "expressing",
          "creativity",
          "structuring"
        ],
        "correctAnswer": "creativity,clarity,expressing",
        "explanation": "Focusing on creativity and clarity emphasizes the pen's added value."
      },
      {
        "instruction": "Complete the call to action to close the sale.",
        "codeTemplate": "Imagine the possibilities! Are you ready to ___ this pen and ___ your potential? Let's ___ it happen.",
        "options": [
          "unlock",
          "seize",
          "grab",
          "explore",
          "make",
          "own"
        ],
        "correctAnswer": "own,unlock,make",
        "explanation": "A strong call to action encourages the customer to visualize ownership and take the next step."
      }
    ]
  }
}
```
